code:
import io
import string

fn byte_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  let b = byte_at(s, i)
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  let b = byte_at(s, i)
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  mut best_val = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      let b = byte_at(line, i)
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      while i < n and is_digit(line, i)
        val = val * 10 + (byte_at(line, i) - 48)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let signed = val * sign
      let absv = if signed < 0
        -signed
      else
        signed
      end
      if not found
        found = true
        best_val = signed
        best_abs = absv
      else if absv < best_abs
        best_val = signed
        best_abs = absv
      end
    end
  end
  println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  process(line)
when None
  ()
end
